incident: A food distribution drive in West End is running short on ration packets for migrant workers. The field team needs procurement help, packaging volunteers, and crowd coordination.
support: Ration packets, packaging volunteers, crowd coordination

incident: A pipeline burst in South District has left four lanes without clean drinking water since early morning. Families need tanker delivery, storage containers, and field coordination.
support: Water tankers, storage containers, field coordination

incident: The mid-day meal program at three schools in Central Ward has been disrupted due to a supplier failure. Volunteers are needed to source and deliver cooked meals for 400+ students today.
support: Cooked meal sourcing, delivery coordination, school liaison

incident: Elderly residents in North Point are unable to access the weekly ration distribution point due to mobility issues. Home delivery volunteers are urgently needed for 25 registered households.
support: Home delivery volunteers, ration coordination, mobility support

incident: A water purification unit donated to East Market has broken down. Residents are relying on unsafe sources. A technician volunteer and temporary water supply are needed immediately.
support: Technician volunteer, temporary water supply, purification tablets
